name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: must-win Senate seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
Friends: When I think of the word "fearless," I think of my friend Wisconsin Sen. Tammy Baldwin. But right now, Tammy's in one of the toughest Senate races in the country, and she needs our help to fend off all of the GOP's attacks.
_The Washington Post_ said Democrats can't take back the Senate unless we hold Wisconsin's Senate seat - so the GOP has _already_ spent more money against Tammy than all other Democratic incumbents combined, including multiple seven-figure checks from the Koch brothers.
I know from experience that Tammy can't fight back without a massive swell of grassroots support. **That's why I told her we'd help her raise another $7,500 by midnight - but we're falling short, so I'm counting on you now.**
****[Please, give $5 or more- every dollar you can - before midnight to help Tammy Baldwin protect Wisconsin's must-win Senate seat and take back the Senate this fall!](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4tb?refcode=jtk829-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)****
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be evenly split between Jeanne Shaheen and Tammy Baldwin:_
**[Click to donate $5.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4tb?refcode=jtk829-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5)**
**[Click to donate $25.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4tb?refcode=jtk829-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25)**
**[Click to donate $50.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4tb?refcode=jtk829-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50)**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4tb?refcode=jtk829-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
Thank you,
Jeanne

name: Amanda Brown Lierman, Democrats.org
subject: Organizing early is the only way to win
body:
We have to make sure Democratic candidates have the resources they need to organize and win.
---
Derek --

When I started building out the political and organizing team at the DNC, I knew one thing for sure: I didn't want to hire people who know how to schmooze -- I was looking for organizers who have done the work that wins elections.

The truth is that Democrats won't win big this year unless we organize in every single community across the country -- and our victories in states like Alabama and Oklahoma show that any state is fair game.

My team is already working on the ground in states across the country to build a massive, national organizing program. But organizing is expensive, and without a huge amount of grassroots support, we won't be able to build the kind of organization we will need to take back Congress and start fundamentally changing our country's politics.

**Chip in $3, before Wednesday's end-of-month deadline, to fund the DNC's 2018 organizing program and help elect Democrats nationwide. If we don't organize, we won't win -- it's that simple.**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522068/4067b0a/56f7074b9/7e543bb9/3188253976/VEsEAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-grassroots-organizing?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=25+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180225_abl_v3s3&source=em_20180225_abl_v3s3&refcode=em_20180225_abl_v3s3")
[DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522068/4067b0a/56f7074b9/7e543b46/3188253976/VEsEAw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-grassroots-organizing?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=26+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20180225_abl_v3s3&source=em_20180225_abl_v3s3&refcode=em_20180225_abl_v3s3")
[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522068/4067b0a/56f7074b9/7e543b47/3188253976/VEsEAg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-grassroots-organizing?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=27+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180225_abl_v3s3&source=em_20180225_abl_v3s3&refcode=em_20180225_abl_v3s3")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522068/4067b0a/56f7074b9/7e543b44/3188253976/VEsEDQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-grassroots-organizing?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=28+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180225_abl_v3s3&source=em_20180225_abl_v3s3&refcode=em_20180225_abl_v3s3")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522068/4067b0a/56f7074b9/7e543b45/3188253976/VEsEDA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-grassroots-organizing?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=29+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180225_abl_v3s3&source=em_20180225_abl_v3s3&refcode=em_20180225_abl_v3s3")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522068/4067b0a/56f7074b9/7e543b42/3188253976/VEsFBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dnc-grassroots-organizing?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=30+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180225_abl_v3s3&source=em_20180225_abl_v3s3&refcode=em_20180225_abl_v3s3")
** Here's the thing, Derek: Organizing doesn't happen overnight. It requires building relationships with people on the ground and making long-term investments that will last beyond a single election cycle.

We've already seen what happens when we invest early. After sending organizers to Alabama to work directly with Doug Jones' campaign, we shocked Republicans with a victory no one thought was possible. The DNC also made critical investments in Virginia that helped elect Ralph Northam governor and flip 15 House of Delegates seats from red to blue.

Those victories are proof that in order to replicate our success this year, we need to scale our organizing work -- and we need to do it early.

[**Contribute $3 right now to elect Democrats nationwide this year. The investments we make now will determine our success in November.**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522068/4067b0a/56f7074b9/7e543b43/3188253976/VEsFBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dnc-grassroots-organizing?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=31+-+Contribute++if+consinConsGroup28497++set&utm_campaign=em_20180225_abl_v3s3&source=em_20180225_abl_v3s3&refcode=em_20180225_abl_v3s3")

Organizing early is the only way to win. Thanks for making that work possible.

Amanda

Amanda Brown Lierman
Political and Organizing Director
Democratic National Committee

Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522068/4067b0a/56f7074b9/7e543b41/3188253976/VEsFBg/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=33+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180225_abl_v3s3&source=em_20180225_abl_v3s3&refcode=em_20180225_abl_v3s3"). Click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522068/4067b0a/56f7074b9/7e543b4e/3188253976/VEsFAQ/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=34+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180225_abl_v3s3&source=em_20180225_abl_v3s3&refcode=em_20180225_abl_v3s3") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522068/4067b0a/56f7074b9/7e543b4f/3188253976/VEsFAA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=35+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180225_abl_v3s3&source=em_20180225_abl_v3s3&refcode=em_20180225_abl_v3s3"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Jason Kander
subject: this makes my stomach churn
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Wolf for Governor
body:
\-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Voting is one of our most important constitutional rights, and exercising that right is deeply personal. The thought of having that right stolen from us by politicians makes my stomach churn.

_But unfortunately, that 's exactly what Republicans in Pennsylvania are doing._

Earlier this month, the Pennsylvania Supreme Court ruled Pennsylvania's gerrymandered maps unconstitutional. So Pennsylvania Republicans tried to put in place a new gerrymandered map that was even worse than the one before.

**[Thankfully, Governor Tom Wolf rejected the Republican map.](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecf07/73a2bc12/3e8178dd/1fccbe5e/2841836810/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIxODMyNiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wolf-sued-gerrymandering?utm_campaign=em18_180225_kande_fnd_clq_act_ger_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180225_kande_fnd_clq_act_ger_&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&recurring=auto&amount=25&utm_content=1+-+Thankfully+Governor+Tom+Wolf+rejected+th")**

But now, Paul Ryan and Washington Republicans are doing everything in their power to stop a new, fairly drawn map in Pennsylvania. **[We need to double down on our efforts to stop gerrymandering and protect the right to vote. So I 'm asking, can you pitch in $5 to Governor Wolf right now? ](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecf07/73a2bc12/3e8178dd/1fccbe5d/2841836810/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIxODMyNiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wolf-sued-gerrymandering?utm_campaign=em18_180225_kande_fnd_clq_act_ger_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180225_kande_fnd_clq_act_ger_&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&recurring=auto&amount=25&utm_content=2+-+We+need+to+double+down+on+our+efforts+to")** | | [**$5**](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecf07/73a2bc12/3e8178dd/1fccbe5c/2841836810/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIxODMyNiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wolf-sued-gerrymandering?utm_campaign=em18_180225_kande_fnd_clq_act_ger_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180225_kande_fnd_clq_act_ger_&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&recurring=auto&amount=5&utm_content=3+-+5")

---
As Secretary of State in Missouri, making sure eligible voters could get to the polls and vote was a huge part of my job. During that time, I saw the Republican voter suppression playbook up close and personal.

**[So let me be straight with you. What Republicans did in Pennsylvania to draw maps that didn't really represent the people was voter suppression -- plain and simple.](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecf07/73a2bc12/3e8178dd/1fccbe46/2841836810/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIxODMyNiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wolf-sued-gerrymandering?utm_campaign=em18_180225_kande_fnd_clq_act_ger_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180225_kande_fnd_clq_act_ger_&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&recurring=auto&amount=25&utm_content=9+-+So+let+me+be+straight+with+you+What+Repu")**

That's why it's so important that we fight back and show that we aren't going to stand for gerrymandering any longer.

**[So look, if Republican attempts at voter suppression make you as mad as it makes me, then please, chip in now to show Governor Wolf he has our support in the fight to end gerrymandering:](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecf07/73a2bc12/3e8178dd/1fccbe45/2841836810/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIxODMyNiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wolf-sued-gerrymandering?utm_campaign=em18_180225_kande_fnd_clq_act_ger_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180225_kande_fnd_clq_act_ger_&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&recurring=auto&amount=25&utm_content=10+-+FIRSTNAMESo+look+if+Republican+attempts+")**

clean_body: \-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Voting is one of our most important constitutional rights, and exercising that right is deeply personal. The thought of having that right stolen from us by politicians makes my stomach churn. But unfortunately, that 's exactly what Republicans in Pennsylvania are doing. Earlier this month, the Pennsylvania Supreme Court ruled Pennsylvania's gerrymandered maps unconstitutional. So Pennsylvania Republicans tried to put in place a new gerrymandered map that was even worse than the one before. "" But now, Paul Ryan and Washington Republicans are doing everything in their power to stop a new, fairly drawn map in Pennsylvania. "" | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" As Secretary of State in Missouri, making sure eligible voters could get to the polls and vote was a huge part of my job. During that time, I saw the Republican voter suppression playbook up close and personal. "" That's why it's so important that we fight back and show that we aren't going to stand for gerrymandering any longer. subject: The latest
body:
Peter, thank you for your ongoing interest and support. Our
message is making a real difference in America. Be sure to read
through this email to get a quick overview on the latest news!

Peter, thank you for your
ongoing interest and support. Our message is making a real
difference in America. Be sure to read through this email to get
a quick overview on the latest news!

Gun Violence:

In the wake of the tragic school
shooting in Florida, Gov. Kasich spoke about gun violence and the
need to support commonsense gun laws that make sense.

CNN State of the Union (2/18/18):

If you agree, please take a
moment to sign our petition and help us get this message out far
and wide: JohnKasich.com/CommonSenseGunLaws

ABC "This Week" with Colorado
Gov. John Hickenlooper (2/25/18):

Meet the Press Daily with Alaska
Gov. Bill Walker (2/23/18):

Health Care Update:

Independent Gov. Bill Walker and
Democrat Gov. John Hickenlooper joined Gov. Kasich in Washington
on Friday to announce their bipartisan blueprint to help improve
the performance of America's health care system.

States serve as the best
laboratories for democracy and Governors are leading on these
vital issues while Washington plays politics.

Read More - TIME Op-Ed: Congress
Can Only Fix Health Care With Bipartisan Teamwork

Watch Full Press Conference:

Fundraising Deadline:

We're nearing our February
fundraising deadline and could use your help. Our message is
making a difference but we need to raise the funds to continue
paying for the services that allow us to support Gov. Kasich's
mission.

If you'd like to chip in $10,
$25, $50 or whatever you can to help, please visit our secure
donation form (here).

Recent News:

1. In addition to recently
announcing that Gov. Kasich will visit New Hampshire in early
April to participate in a panel discussion, it was also announced
that Gov. Kasich has accepted the invitation to deliver the
commencement address for Harvard Kennedy School class of 2018 on
May 23rd. Read more (here)

2. Gov. Kasich was recently
listed in The Hill's "10 Governors Shaping the Future of
Politics" - Read more (here)

3. Gov. Kasich submitted an op-ed
to a prominent German newspaper about America's diminishing role
in the world to coincide with the Munich Security Conference. He
was scheduled to speak at the conference, but - due to the tragic
deaths of two police officers in his hometown - he instead chose
to attend their funeral and support the community during that
difficult time. Read the op-ed (here)

4. Gov. Kasich was awarded the
Economic Patriot Award by The Concord Coalition for his ongoing
work to challenge Washington to balance America's budget and
avoid burdening future generations with runaway debt.

5. We wanted to share one final
clip with you from Sunday's ABC "This Week" appearance. Gov.
Kasich responds to a question about how he intends to support
candidates in 2018:

Thank you for your ongoing
support!

-Team Kasich

for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's
committee.

Team -- The Senate has just a few weeks left to overturn the FCC's disastrous decision to end net neutrality, the rules that guarantee a free and open Internet.
[**Please sign our petition urging the Senate to protect net neutrality.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdfd9/2a380d31/4e2185d/f1ec45/2248748420/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/save_net_neutrality/?code=hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2017_net-neutrality-up%3Frefcode%3De20180224_netneutJA_up")
Upholding the net neutrality repeal could mean that Internet service providers would be able to censor, block, slow down or slap a fee on any site of their choosing, and it could mean that you have to pay extra to access your email or read your favorite news outlet.
Time is running out -- the Senate only has a few more weeks to protect a free and open Internet.
[**Please join grassroots activists across the country and put your name down to call on the Senate to protect the Internet as we know it.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdfd9/2a380d31/4e2185d/f1ec45/2248748420/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/save_net_neutrality/?code=hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2017_net-neutrality-up%3Frefcode%3De20180224_netneutJA_up")

body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c57c6/24c69fd9/110c7e5a1/18973afe/821788936/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFEN49N_digital_email_20180225_EOMSupporterRecord_inact&source=WQEFEN49N_digital_email_20180225_EOMSupporterRecord_inact")
---

Peter,

There are only _nine days left_ before our first major elections of 2018!

We have five women in Texas with primaries on March 6th.

Since this is our last deadline before their elections, I'm going through our supporter records to make sure everyone is pitching in.

This is what I have on file for this email address:
**2018 Cycle Donor:** Not yet
**[Suggested action: Donate $3 to help reach our $150,000 End-of-Month goal and help our women win in just nine days.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c57c6/24c69fd9/110c7e5a1/18973aff/821788936/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180225_email_FebruaryEOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Suggested+action+Donate+if+consinConsGro&utm_campaign=WQEFEN49N_digital_email_20180225_EOMSupporterRecord_inact&source=WQEFEN49N_digital_email_20180225_EOMSupporterRecord_inact")**
This community has stepped up _so much_ in the last 13 months.

The outpouring of support and enthusiasm has led to endorsements of dozens of women and launched brand-new programs.

If we can keep it up, you can expect a record-breaking number of endorsements and a historic year for women.

Pennsylvania Republicans spent years rigging our electoral maps.

And after the state Supreme Court ruled their congressional map unconstitutional, they tried to draw another designed to benefit them.

Governor Wolf fought back and rejected their maps. And last week, the Pennsylvania Supreme Court drew maps that would finally give Pennsylvania voters a fair chance to make their voices heard.

But now Republicans are suing to bring back the rigged maps -- and they're backed with President Trump's support. If they defeat Tom in November and win in court, we could be stuck with unfair maps for years to come.

body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3181/9e00690/42bac21e/2403a51e/2952705166/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180225_EOM1_fnd_gq_act__SA&source=em18_180225_EOM1_fnd_gq_act__SA")
Hello,

The _Tampa Bay Times_ , the largest newspaper in Florida, has some things to say about you and Andrew Gillum. It's pretty incredible. Here are three things they report:
> **1\. "Florida Democratic activists love Andrew Gillum."
>
> 2\. "[He's the] only one [who] consistently draws sizable crowds of activists."
>
> 3\. "[He's] a charismatic speaker and a proud liberal." **
So, what does this mean for the campaign?

It means that we have the momentum. The energy. The ability to get out the vote in a state where Democrats have made a habit of losing by 1% due to lack of enthusiasm.

**It means, with your help, we are going to win this primary. And when we do, we'll actually have the #GOTV operation to win in November.

[I cannot overstate how historic this win will be for Florida. So chip in today.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3181/9e00690/42bac21e/2403a511/2952705166/VEsE/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-feb-2018-eom?utm_campaign=em18_180225_EOM1_fnd_gq_act__SA&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em18_180225_EOM1_fnd_gq_act__SA&utm_content=2+-+I+cannot+overstate+how+historic+this+win")**

And I also can't overstate how much it means that you're part of it now. You aren't waiting for someone to tell you who should be your general election candidate.

Because you know what? That has always been bad advice. And we also recently learned that Andrew Gillum, in a general election against the leading Republican, outperforms the candidate many have been calling the frontrunner since before this campaign started!

This is really our moment.

**[Keep sending in those contributions. No matter the size.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3181/9e00690/42bac21e/2403a510/2952705166/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-feb-2018-eom?utm_campaign=em18_180225_EOM1_fnd_gq_act__SA&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em18_180225_EOM1_fnd_gq_act__SA&utm_content=3+-+Keep+sending+in+those+contributions+No+m")**

Every dollar counts.

Thank you for everything you're doing and about to do.

Scott Arceneaux
Senior Strategist
Andrew Gillum for Governor
